primary_blocker: Revenue roughly as expected (not a dramatic surprise) — income alone not the clincher
key_intelligence: STL-SW 4-bed Sussex bungalow adjacent to Natalia's own home. Fully furnished, freshly renovated, roof terrace, garden. Previous self-managed LTL at 3,400/mo; bad tenants drove the switch. Motivation split between income and CONTROL. Section 21 changes and potential future sale are key drivers. Oil heating + EPCR renewal needed. Primary pitch: flexibility and control, not income ceiling.
top_objections: Revenue is roughly what I expected — is the switch worth it?
what_resonated: Flexibility vs fixed tenancy (can sell with notice)
Stayful managing linen hire and day-to-day
Mid-July launch to capture August bookings
